action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 19 failed because ReduceLROnPlateau received verbose argument (deprecated in PyTorch 2.x). Training did not run; therefore no new checkpoint. Code fix: remove verbose=False. Decision: Rewrite train.py to fix scheduler, train 30 epochs, save best checkpoint, and submit eval immediately to get baseline test AUC. Also, model may be overfitting on small data, but we'll get a baseline first.
